channel.title: RSS Aggregator Feed
channel.description: An aggregated feed of Technology-related news

item.title: What is the release date for Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 2 on Paramount+?
item.description: Last week, we learned that Monica Dutton has been killed off since we last saw her. But when does Marshals: A Yellowstone Story episode 2 hit Paramount+?

item.title: Anthropic to challenge DOD’s supply chain label in court
item.description: Anthropic CEO Dario Amodei said he plans to challenge the Department of Defense's designation of the AI firm as a supply chain risk. He claims most Anthropic customers are unaffected by the label.

item.title: Amazon.com says things are fixed after some issues with logging in and checking out
item.description: If you were having issues shopping on Amazon or loading your playlists on Amazon Music on Thursday, you weren't alone. For over three hours today, Downdetector showed a sizable spike in people reporting issues with checkout, search, and logging in. The problem seemed to be affecting both the site and the mobile apps. But an […]

item.title: Google Workspace CLI brings Gmail, Docs, Sheets and more into a common interface for AI agents
item.description: What's old is new: the command line — the original, clunky non-graphical interface for interacting with and controlling PCs, where the user just typed in raw commands in code — has become one of the most important interfaces in agentic AI.That shift has been driven in part by the rise of coding-native tools such as Claude Code and Kilo CLI, which have helped establish a model where AI agents do not just answer questions in chat windows but execute real tasks through a shared, scriptable interface already familiar to developers — and which can still be found on virtually all PCs. For developers...

item.title: The best iPad deals you can get right now
item.description: While the best iPad deals usually land during major sale events like Black Friday, many great iPad deals are available outside of those times. The day-to-day discounts come and go like changing winds, so there’s often some amount to be saved, particularly on Apple’s most affordable iPad and the latest iPad Mini. Hell, you can even […]

item.title: This $9 fix is a great way to watch the Australian GP even if you're on the move — here's what you need to know
item.description: It's cheaper than you think to ensure you don't miss out on the action

item.title: I've spent 40 hours cracking skulls and casting spells from behind Avowed's Quarterstaff, and Obsidian's action role-playing game is better than ever on PlayStation 5
item.description: Thanks to an awesome anniversary update, the PS5 version of Avowed gives Obsidian Entertainment's excellent action role-playing game a second chance to find the audience it deserves.

item.title: How to watch Dallas Stars vs. Colorado Avalanche online for free
item.description: How to watch NHL for free. Live stream Dallas Stars vs. Colorado Avalanche in the NHL for free.

item.title: How to watch USA vs. Brazil in the 2026 World Baseball Classic online for free
item.description: How to watch World Baseball Classic for free. Live stream USA vs. Brazil in the 2026 World Baseball Classic for free.

item.title: What if your real computer was a super-sized Lego computer brick?
item.description: In 1979 - nearly 50 years ago - Lego jazzed up its very first spaceships with an iconic sloped computer brick that was just painted plastic. In 2022, we introduced you to the engineer who fit an actual tiny computer inside. Now, industrial designer Paul Staal has flipped the script with a working desktop PC […]

item.title: How conspiracy theories spread before the internet, according to Tracy Letts’s ‘Bug’ on Broadway
item.description: Fast Company recently spoke with Namir Smallwood, who is starring opposite Carrie Coon in a 30-year-old play that feels creepily perfect for our era. Conspiracy theories are literally contagious. Recent research on misinformation and how it goes viral across social networks has revealed remarkable parallels to how diseases spread in populations.

item.title: Amazon outage: Heres what we know so far
item.description: Amazon went down on Thursday. Here's what we know so far.
